fixes_applied_before_testing.issue: remove() constructed a fresh DynArray via 'DynArray[Address]()' inside the method body — forbidden by GenVM runtime ('this class can't be instantiated by user')
fixes_applied_before_testing.fix_attempt_1: Switched to gl.storage.inmem_allocate(DynArray[Address]) — also failed on this runtime with 'TypeError: _GenericAlias.__init__() missing 1 required positional argument: args'
fixes_applied_before_testing.fix_final: Removed in-memory DynArray construction entirely. remove() now finds the index of the target address in the existing top-level agent_addresses DynArray and calls 'del self.agent_addresses[idx]' in place, relying only on MutableSequence support of the auto-initialized state field.

fixes_applied_before_testing.issue: First redeploy attempt during testing was actually still running the original unfixed remove() code (stale file redeployed by mistake), producing the DynArray[Address]() error again mid-test-run
fixes_applied_before_testing.fix: Redeployed with the confirmed final AgentRegistry.py; no code change, deployment/process issue only

tests.description: Basic self-registration of a test agent
tests.expected: Registers successfully, stored under the given address
tests.note: Capability field was entered with a leading space (' security-audit') by typo — did not break lookups, see test_3

tests.description: getAgents() returns the newly registered agent
tests.expected: List with 1 entry, active=true, capability as stored

tests.description: findByCapability('security-audit') matches despite the stored value having a leading space
tests.expected: 1 match — findByCapability normalizes via .strip().lower() on both sides before comparing

tests.description: register() called again for an address already registered
tests.expected: revert: 'Agent already registered at this address'

actual_result.rollback_message: Agent already registered at this address

tests.description: register() called for a different address than the caller — allowed only because caller == registry owner (bootstrap invariant from stage 2, not a permission bug)
tests.expected: Succeeds because the calling account is the registry owner (the deployer); a non-owner, non-self caller would be rejected — not independently verifiable with a single Studio account
tests.status: PASS (owner-bootstrap path confirmed; third-party rejection path untested — needs a second wallet)

tests.description: update() changes capability/version/description and deactivates the agent
tests.expected: Fields updated, active=false, entry still present (not removed)
tests.note: First attempt accidentally submitted to register() instead of update() (missing 'active' field, empty address) and failed as expected with 'invalid address' — corrected by resubmitting via the update() form

tests.description: findByCapability filters out the now-inactive TestAgent, still returns active Impersonator
tests.expected: 1 match (Impersonator only) — deactivated agents must not surface in capability lookups

tests.description: remove() deletes a registered agent from both the TreeMap and the address index (validates the inmem_allocate-free rewrite)
tests.expected: Succeeds; getAgents() afterward no longer lists this address at all
tests.note: First attempt against a stale pre-fix deployment failed with the original DynArray[Address]() bug; redeployed the confirmed fixed contract and repeated this test, which then passed

tests.description: remove() on an address that was never registered

untested_paths: Third-party (non-owner, non-self) rejection in register() — requires a second Studio wallet to verify
coverage: owner-bootstrap registration on behalf of another address
remove() deletes from both TreeMap and address index (DynArray-construction bug fixed and verified)
